options.name: -filter
options.description: Filters the collection with the specified expression

options.name: -nocase
options.description: Pattern matching is not case sensitive

options.name: -of_objects
options.description: Creates a collection of all ports associated with the specified nets

options.description: Suppresses all error and warning messages generated when the get_ports command is run

options.description: Suppresses all error and warning messages generated when the get_ports command is run
